zh.lifeSummary: 當Charles Stearne於1523年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可考費爾德時，他的父親Charles Sterne23歲，母親Susanna Waller18歲。他於大約1548年與Mrs. Charles Stearne在英國英格蘭素福爾可考費爾德結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1577年3月17日在他的家鄉享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可考費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Charles Stearne于1523年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可考費爾德时，他的父亲Charles Sterne23岁，母亲Susanna Waller18岁。他于大约1548年与Mrs. Charles Stearne在英国英格兰素福爾可考費爾德结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1577年3月17日在他的家乡享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可考費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Charles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Germanic word, karl, meaning ‘free man’, akin to Old English ceorl ‘man’. The name, Latin form Carolus, owed its popularity in medieval Europe to the Frankish leader Charlemagne ( ?742–814 ), who in 800 established himself as Holy Roman Emperor. His name (Latin Carolus Magnus) means ‘Charles the Great’. Carolus—or Karl, the German form—was a common name among Frankish leaders, including Charlemagne's grandfather Charles Martel ( 688–741 ). Charles is the French form. The name occurs occasionally in medieval Britain as Karolus or Carolus; it had a certain vogue in West Yorkshire from the 1400s, particularly among gentry families. The form Charles was chosen by Mary Queen of Scots ( 1542–87 ), who had been brought up in France, for her son, Charles James ( 1566–1625 ), who became King James VI of Scotland and, from 1603 , James I of England. His son and grandson both reigned as King Charles , and the name thus became established in the 17th century both in the Stuart royal house and among English and Scottish supporters of the Stuart monarchy. In the 18th century it was to some extent favoured, along with James , by Jacobites, supporters of the exiled Stuarts, opposed to the Hanoverian monarchy, especially in the Highlands of Scotland. In the 19th century the popularity of the name was further enhanced by romanticization of the story of ‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’, leader of the 1745 rebellion.

en.lifeSummary: When Charles Stearne was born in 1523, in Cockfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Charles Sterne, was 23 and his mother, Susanna Waller, was 18. He married Mrs. Charles Stearne about 1548, in Cockfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 17 March 1577, in his hometown, at the age of 54, and was buried in Cockfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Charles Stearne est né en 1523, à Cockfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Charles Sterne, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Susanna Waller, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Charles Stearne environ 1548, à Cockfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 17 mars 1577, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Cockfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Charles Stearne 1523 in Cockfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Charles Sterne 23 und seine Mutter Susanna Waller 18. Er hat um 1548 in Cockfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Mrs. Charles Stearne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 17. März 1577 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Cockfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Charles Stearne è nato il nel 1523 nel Cockfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Charles Sterne, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Susanna Waller, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Charles Stearne circa 1548, nel Cockfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 17 marzo 1577, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Cockfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Charles Stearneが1523年にイギリスイギリススフォルクコクフィールドで生まれた時，父Charles Sterneは23歳，母Susanna Wallerは18歳であった。約1548年にイギリスイギリススフォルクコクフィールドでMrs. Charles Stearneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1577年3月17日に故郷で54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクコクフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Charles Stearne(이)가 1523년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 콕필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Charles Sterne(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Susanna Waller(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1548년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 콕필드에서 Mrs. Charles Stearne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1577년 3월 17일 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 콕필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Charles Stearne nasceu em 1523, em Cockfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Charles Sterne, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Susanna Waller, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Charles Stearne aproximadamente 1548, em Cockfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 17 de março de 1577, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Cockfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Charles Stearne родился в 1523 г. в местности коккфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Charles Sterne было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Susanna Waller, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Charles Stearne около 1548 г. в местности коккфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 17 марта 1577 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности коккфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Charles Stearne nació en 1523, en Cockfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Charles Sterne, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Susanna Waller, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Mrs. Charles Stearne aproximadamente 1548, en Cockfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 17 de marzo de 1577, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Cockfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
